items.title: Trump’s ex-crypto advisor: US government must go beyond ‘liking Bitcoin’
items.summary: Bitcoin will eventually reach a point where the US government creates the conditions it needs to succeed, whether that takes 10 or 20 years, according to a Bitcoin executive.
items.title_cn: 特朗普前加密货币顾问：美国政府必须超越“喜欢比特币”
items.summary_cn: 一位比特币高管表示，比特币最终将达到一个阶段，届时美国政府将创造其成功所需的条件，无论这需要10年还是20年。

items.title: Ray Dalio cautions on Bitcoin, says ‘there is only one gold’
items.summary: Ray Dalio said that gold is a better safe-haven asset in times of conflict compared to Bitcoin, and raised concerns about the cryptocurrency’s lack of privacy.
items.title_cn: 雷·达里奥对比特币发出警告，称“黄金只有一种”
items.summary_cn: 雷·达里奥表示，在冲突时期，黄金是比比特币更好的避险资产，并对加密货币缺乏隐私性表示担忧。

items.title: Locals prefer satoshis to dollars, says Africa Bitcoin chair Stafford Masie
items.summary: In an interview with Natalie Brunell on Coin Stories, Masie described Bitcoin as functional currency in parts of Africa amid rapid inflation and currency debasement.
items.title_cn: 非洲比特币主席斯塔福德·马西表示：当地人更青睐聪而非美元
items.summary_cn: 在Coin Stories的采访中，马西将比特币描述为非洲部分地区在快速通胀和货币贬值背景下的功能性货币。

items.title: US Dollar Index nears 3-month high: Is this good or bad for Bitcoin?
items.summary: US Dollar Index strength, fear that BTC miners may liquidate their reserves and Bitcoin’s performance compared to stocks raise concerns among investors.
items.title_cn: 美元指数逼近三个月高点：这对比特币是好是坏？
items.summary_cn: 美元指数走强、对比特币矿工可能抛售储备的担忧，以及比特币相对于股票的表现，引发了投资者的忧虑。

items.title: Bitcoin falls 3% in global sell-off as oil fears hit stocks and gold
items.summary: Bitcoin bulls gave up their latest mission to reclaim $70,000 as Iran escalation sparked oil supply fears that gripped stocks and gold.
items.title_cn: 全球抛售中比特币下跌3%，石油恐慌冲击股市和黄金
items.summary_cn: 随着伊朗局势升级引发石油供应担忧并波及股市和黄金，比特币多头放弃了最近夺回70,000美元的尝试。

items.title: Ether supply on exchanges drops to multi-year lows: Here’s why it matters
items.summary: Ether reserves held on exchanges fell to a new multi-year low as ETH price struggled to trade above $2,000. Will the supply crunch benefit bulls or bears?
items.title_cn: 交易所以太坊供应量降至多年低点：原因及影响解析
items.summary_cn: 随着以太坊价格难以突破2,000美元，交易所持有的以太坊储备降至新的多年低点。供应紧缩将有利于多头还是空头？

items.title: Ether price again rejected at $2K: How low can ETH go in March?
items.summary: Ether needed to hold a key support recently established at $1,800, coinciding with the lower trend line of a classic chart pattern that warns of a drop below $1,500.
items.title_cn: 以太坊价格再次在2,000美元受阻：三月ETH可能跌至多低？
items.summary_cn: 以太坊需要守住最近在1,800美元附近建立的关键支撑位，该位置与一个经典图表形态的下趋势线重合，该形态预示着可能跌破1,500美元。

items.title: Ethereum smart accounts are finally coming ‘within a year’ — Vitalik Buterin
items.summary: Removing intermediaries with account abstraction is a “core principle of non-ugly cypherpunk Ethereum,” said Buterin.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin：以太坊智能账户终将“在一年内”到来
items.summary_cn: Buterin表示，通过账户抽象消除中间商是“非丑陋密码朋克以太坊的核心原则”。

items.title: Magic Eden winds down EVM, Bitcoin NFT markets to focus on gambling
items.summary: Magic Eden is shifting resources from NFTs to its casino platform Dicey, after a closed beta saw $15 million wagered by around 200 users in two months.
items.title_cn: Magic Eden关闭EVM和比特币NFT市场，专注于赌博业务
items.summary_cn: Magic Eden正在将资源从NFT转向其赌博平台Dicey，此前其封闭测试版在两个月内吸引了约200名用户下注1,500万美元。

items.title: AI ‘vibe coding’ could put Ethereum roadmap ahead of schedule: Vitalik Buterin
items.summary: Vitalik Buterin says AI coding still has “massive caveats,” but people should expect Ethereum’s roadmap to be finished much faster than expected.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin：AI“氛围编码”或使以太坊路线图提前完成
items.summary_cn: Vitalik Buterin表示，AI编码仍存在“巨大缺陷”，但人们应预期以太坊的路线图将比预期快得多地完成。

items.title: Bitgo Europe Expands Crypto-as-a-Service Across the European Economic Area
items.summary: Bitgo has launched its Crypto-as-a-Service platform across 30 European countries to provide businesses with compliant digital asset infrastructure. Bitgo Europe GmbH is expanding its Crypto-as-a-Service (CaaS) across the European Economic Area (EEA) as of March 2026. The rollout allows European banks and fintech firms to programmatically onboard users under the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulatory […]
items.title_cn: Bitgo Europe将加密即服务扩展至整个欧洲经济区
items.summary_cn: Bitgo已在30个欧洲国家推出其加密即服务平台，为企业提供合规的数字资产基础设施。Bitgo Europe GmbH正在将其加密即服务扩展至整个欧洲经济区，自2026年3月起生效。此次推广允许欧洲银行...

items.title: Core Scientific to Sell 2,500 Bitcoin as Company Pivots Toward AI
items.summary: Core Scientific expects to sell most of its 2,500 BTC holdings in Q1 2026 to strengthen liquidity and fund AI-focused data center expansion. The move reflects a broader shift among public miners pivoting toward high-performance computing. CORZ Plans Q1 Bitcoin Exit for AI Push Core Scientific (NASDAQ: CORZ) is preparing to part with most of […]
items.title_cn: Core Scientific计划出售2,500枚比特币，公司转向人工智能领域
items.summary_cn: Core Scientific预计将在2026年第一季度出售其持有的2,500枚比特币中的大部分，以增强流动性并资助专注于人工智能的数据中心扩张。此举反映了公共矿商向高性能计算转型的更广泛趋势。CORZ计划第一季度出售比特币以推动AI发展...

items.title: Polymarket Pulls Nuclear Detonation Market Following Public Backlash
items.summary: War betting, insider trading accusations, and a list of overseas bans are piling pressure on the prediction market giant.
items.title_cn: Polymarket因公众强烈反对下架核爆炸预测市场
items.summary_cn: 战争投注、内幕交易指控以及一系列海外禁令正给这家预测市场巨头带来压力。

items.title: Bybit Blocks $300 Million in Crypto Scams Using AI

The exchange says its multi-layered defense system sets a new standard for proactive crypto security. Artificial Intelligence (AI) Shields Users as Bybit Sets New Security Benchmark in 2025 Bybit says it prevented $300 million in scam-related losses in the […]

items.title: Vitalik Buterin Urges Ethereum to Broaden Its Mission Beyond Finance
items.summary: Ethereum’s co-founder is calling for “sanctuary technologies” spanning privacy tools, social systems, and infrastructure beyond finance.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin敦促以太坊将其使命扩展到金融之外
items.summary_cn: 以太坊联合创始人呼吁发展“庇护技术”，涵盖隐私工具、社会系统以及金融之外的基础设施。

items.summary: Crypto.com is donating $1 million to After-School All-Stars to expand educational and summer programming for youth across the United States. On March 2, 2026, Crypto.com announced a $1 million donation to After-School All-Stars during an on-ice ceremony at the Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles. The event took place during a game between the LA Kings […]

items.summary: Escalating U.S.-Iran tensions and widening geopolitical rifts are driving central banks to reassess gold reserves, with the World Gold Council signaling that deepening global conflict risks will anchor official demand through 2026. Central Banks Recalibrate Gold Buying as Geopolitical Risks Intensify Central bank gold buying moderated at the start of the year, the World Gold […]

items.title: Corporates and Exchanges Rush to Stake Ethereum Instead of Selling
items.summary: Analysts say large investors are increasingly locking up ETH for yield rather than positioning to sell into market rallies.
items.title_cn: 企业和交易所争相质押以太坊而非出售
items.summary_cn: 分析师表示，大型投资者正越来越多地锁定ETH以获取收益，而非在市场反弹时准备抛售。

items.title: AI Models Prefer Bitcoin Over Fiat and Stablecoins, Study Finds
items.summary: Bitcoin Policy Institute study finds AI systems, including Claude, GPT, Grok, and Gemini, favored Bitcoin over fiat and other digital assets.

items.title: Colombian Court Rejects Appeal for AI Writing, Then Gets Flagged By Its Own AI Detector
items.summary: Colombia's top criminal court cited AI detectors to reject a lawyer's appeal. An attorney then ran the court's ruling through the same software and got a 93% match.

items.title: Middle East conflict poses fresh test to central banks as oil shock fuels inflation
items.summary: Middle East conflict has posed a fresh test to central banks, with fears of an oil shock and renewed inflation risks changing their bid to shore up growth.

items.title: Prediction market 'gambling' needs state regulation, not feds, Mick Mulvaney says after Iran war bets
items.summary: Mick Mulvaney also said prediction markets, by offering contracts on events such as wars, could represent a security risk for the U.S.

items.title: New York Fed's Williams says tariff burden falls 'overwhelmingly' on U.S. businesses and consumers
items.summary: Williams said that not only were the tariffs being felt at home, but they also were keeping the Fed from reaching its 2% inflation goal.

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: The macro environment is firmly **Risk-Off**. DXY is strengthening (98.96, +1.38% 5d), VIX is spiking (23.57, +31.46% 5d), and BTC Fear & Greed is at Extreme Fear (10). Fed futures imply restrictive policy (3.61% rate). However, Japan's weak yen (157.407) suggests some risk appetite in carry trades, creating a contradictory signal. Layer 2 news is mixed: macro headlines focus on inflation risks from Middle East conflict, while crypto news shows institutional expansion (BitGo) alongside concerning corporate actions (Core Scientific selling BTC). The narrative lacks a clear bullish catalyst.

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: **OBSERVE**
* **Reality Check**: BTC context shows neutral-bullish momentum (RSI 60.9, MACD +151.8) but weak trend strength (ADX 13.3). The critical data point is **asymmetric liquidation pain**: Short liquidations ($644M) are 2.5x larger than Long liquidations ($258M). This suggests significant short positioning that could fuel a squeeze if bullish momentum appears. However, with macro headwinds (Risk-Off) and no whale flow data, waiting for confirmation is prudent.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: **PROBE** (with tight stops)
* **Reality Check**: News sentiment is cautiously optimistic (exchange supply dropping, smart accounts coming), but whale flow shows **mild accumulation** (Sentiment +0.11, $9.4M net stablecoin inflow). Technically, ETH is choppy (ADX 11.3) with neutral momentum (RSI 55.2, MACD +0.35). The 7-day structural trend appears weak, but 24H immediate flow is slightly positive. **Critical divergence**: News mentions price rejection at $2K, yet whales aren't panic selling. Liquidation shows Longs ($47M) bleeding less than Shorts ($65M), suggesting retail shorts are more pained.
* **Key Metric**: **Whale stablecoin inflow ($9.4M)** while price struggles indicates accumulation during fear.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: **WAIT**
* **Reality Check**: News is identical to generic crypto news (no SOL-specific catalysts), but whale flow shows **clear distribution** (Sentiment -0.46, +1.59M token outflow). This is a **TRAP WARNING**: neutral/positive news while whales exit. Technically weak trend (ADX 14.4) with negative OI delta (-2.83%). The 7-day structural trend and 24H immediate flow both point to selling pressure. Liquidation shows Longs ($2M) bleeding more than Shorts ($1.2M), indicating retail longs are suffering.
* **Key Metric**: **Whale token outflow (1.59M SOL)** despite neutral news signals distribution.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境明确处于 **避险模式**。美元指数走强（98.96，5日+1.38%），恐慌指数飙升（23.57，5日+31.46%），比特币恐惧与贪婪指数处于极度恐惧（10）。美联储期货暗示限制性政策（利率3.61%）。然而，日元疲软（157.407）表明套利交易中存在一些风险偏好，形成矛盾信号。第二层新闻喜忧参半：宏观头条关注中东冲突带来的通胀风险，而加密新闻显示机构扩张（BitGo）与企业抛售（Core Scientific出售BTC）并存。叙事缺乏明确的看涨催化剂。

**🟠 BTC策略（仅合约）**:
* **信号**: **观察**
* **现实检验**: BTC背景显示中性偏多动能（RSI 60.9，MACD +151.8），但趋势强度弱（ADX 13.3）。关键数据点是 **不对称清算痛苦**：空头清算（6.44亿美元）是多头清算（2.58亿美元）的2.5倍。这表明大量空头头寸可能在多头动能出现时引发轧空。然而，鉴于宏观逆风（避险模式）且无鲸鱼流量数据，等待确认是审慎之举。

**🔷 ETH策略**:
* **信号**: **试探**（紧设止损）
* **现实检验**: 新闻情绪谨慎乐观（交易所供应下降，智能账户即将推出），但鲸鱼流量显示 **温和吸筹**（情绪+0.11，净稳定币流入940万美元）。技术上，ETH处于震荡（ADX 11.3），动能中性（RSI 55.2，MACD +0.35）。7日结构性趋势看似疲软，但24小时即时流量略偏积极。**关键背离**：新闻提及价格在2000美元遭拒，但鲸鱼并未恐慌抛售。清算显示多头（4700万美元）流血少于空头（6500万美元），表明散户空头更痛苦。
* **关键指标**: **鲸鱼稳定币流入（940万美元）** 而价格挣扎，表明在恐惧期间吸筹。

**🟣 SOL策略**:
* **信号**: **等待**
* **现实检验**: 新闻与通用加密新闻相同（无SOL特定催化剂），但鲸鱼流量显示 **明确派发**（情绪-0.46，代币流出159万）。这是 **陷阱警告**：中性/正面新闻而鲸鱼退出。技术趋势弱（ADX 14.4），未平仓合约变动为负（-2.83%）。7日结构性趋势和24小时即时流量均指向抛压。清算显示多头（200万美元）流血多于空头（120万美元），表明散户多头正受苦。
* **关键指标**: **鲸鱼代币流出（159万SOL）** 尽管新闻中性，信号派发。
